title: Zymoclean™ Gel DNA Recovery Kit
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a5n5h","text":"This is a protocol for high yield recovery of pure DNA from agarose gels using the Zymoclean™ Gel DNA Recovery Kit.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"3q3c5","text":"All centrifugation steps should be performed between 10,000 - 16,000 x g.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"avd32","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5mn6j","text":"Product Contents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bkcu4","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":3,"length":31},{"style":"bold","offset":46,"length":13},{"style":"bold","offset":71,"length":13},{"style":"bold","offset":97,"length":19},{"style":"bold","offset":119,"length":3},{"style":"bold","offset":151,"length":16},{"style":"bold","offset":192,"length":18},{"style":"bold","offset":234,"length":20},{"style":"bold","offset":374,"length":16},{"style":"bold","offset":411,"length":18},{"style":"sup","offset":166,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"6v0mb","text":"Integrity of kit components is guaranteed for up to one year from date of purchase. Reagents are routinely tested on a lot-to-lot basis to ensure they provide the highest performance and reliability.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":199}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"28ien","text":"1 Ethanol must be added prior to use as indicated on the DNA Wash Buffer label. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":0,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fmbgt","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"daiv5","text":"Specifications","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"80bva","text":"• DNA Purity – High-quality, purified DNA is especially well suited for sequencing and ligation reactions. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ehfid","text":"• DNA Size Limits – From ~50 bp to 23 kb. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"86an8","text":"• DNA Recovery – Typically, up to 5 µg total DNA per column can be eluted into as little as 6 µl of low salt DNA Elution Buffer or water. For DNA 50 bp to 10 kb, the recovery is 70-90%. For DNA 11 kb to 23 kb, the recovery is 50-70%. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":12},{"style":"bold","offset":109,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3ibsi","text":"• Sample Sources – DNA in excised agarose gel slices. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fcaf2","text":"• Product Detergent Tolerance – ≤ 5% Triton X-100, ≤ 5% Tween-20, ≤ 5% Sarkosyl, ≤ 0.1% SDS. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":27}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fdtsh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"788gr","text":"Product Description","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ffvsp","text":" The Zymoclean™Gel DNA Recovery Kit provides a hassle-free method for high yield recovery of pure DNA from agarose gels. Simply add the specially formulated Agarose Dissolving Buffer (ADB) to the gel slice containing your DNA sample, let dissolve, and then transfer to the supplied Zymo-Spin™ Column. There is no need for organic denaturants or chloroform. Instead, the product utilizes Fast-Spin column technology to yield high-quality DNA in just 15 minutes (See figures below). DNA purified using the Zymoclean™ Gel DNA Recovery Kit is perfectly suited for use in DNA ligation reactions, sequencing, DNA labeling reactions, PCR, etc.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":4,"length":31},{"style":"bold","offset":157,"length":31},{"style":"bold","offset":282,"length":17},{"style":"bold","offset":504,"length":31}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d242s","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"24fvi","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"c79ve","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1df9l","text":"Zymoclean™ products are offered in single column (uncapped or capped column) or 96-well format. steps: Excise the DNA fragment from the agarose gel using a razor blade, scalpel or other device and transfer it into a 15 ml microcentrifuge tube The amount of agarose excised from the gel should be as small as possible.

Add 3 volumes of ADB to each volume of agarose excised from the gel. (e.g. for 100 µl (mg) of agarose gel slice add 300 µl of ADB) ADB (Agarose Dissolving Buffer) Contributed by users Catalog #D4001-1-50

Incubate at 37-55 °C for 5-10 minutes until the gel slice is completely dissolved. 00:10:00 Do not incubate above 60°C. It is important that the gel slice dissolve completely. This can be facilitated by gentle mixing during the incubation. For DNA fragments > 8 kb, following the incubation step, add one additional volume (equal to that of the gel slice) of water to the mixture for better DNA recovery (e.g., 100 µl agarose, 300 µl ADB, and 100 µl water). I like to let the agarose dissolve for 15 minutes at 55 °C versus the Zymo recommendation.
Transfer the melted agarose solution to a Zymo-Spin™ Column in a Collection Tube.
Centrifuge for 30-60 seconds. Discard the flow-through. 00:01:00 Remove the flow-through by aspiration. Avoid contamination of the collection tube rim.
Wash #1:Add 200 µl of DNA Wash Buffer to the column. undetermined Zymo DNA Wash Buffer Zymo Research Catalog #D4003-2-6
Wash #1:Centrifuge for 30 seconds. Discard the flow-through. 00:00:30
Wash #2: Add 200 µl of DNA Wash Buffer to the column. undetermined Ultra-pure DNA is now ready for use. Zymo DNA Wash Buffer Zymo Research Catalog #D4003-2-6

Wash #2:Centrifuge for 30 seconds. Discard the flow-through. 00:00:30 DNA Elution Buffer: 10 mM Tris-HCl, pH 8.5, 0.1 mM EDTA. Elution of DNA from the column is dependent on pH and temperature. If water is used, make sure the pH is >6.0. Waiting 1 minute prior to elution may improve the yield of larger (> 6 kb) DNA. For even larger DNA (> 10 kb), the total yield may be improved by eluting the DNA with 60-70 o C DNA Elution Buffer
Add ≥ 6 µl DNA Elution Buffer or waterdirectly to the column matrix. undetermined I use exactly 6 uL of their elution buffer. Zymo DNA Elution Buffer Zymo Research Catalog #D3004-4-1
Place column into a 1.5 ml tube and centrifuge for 30-60 seconds to elute DNA. 00:01:00
creator: Alan Cone
